case_title: BRUCE KRELL, TRUSTEE, KRELL TRUST VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: (SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) [X] THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER: THE REQUEST IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE [X] EXPLANATION FOR DECISION: THIS APPEARS TO BE A CLAIM FOR DAMAGES RATHER THAN A REQUEST FOR TAX REFUND DEFENDANT MAY RENEW ITS DISMISSAL REQUEST AT THE MERITS HEARING IF FACTS WARRANT IT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRUCE KRELL, TRUSTEE, KRELL TRUST IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF NEGLIGENCE CLAIM FAILS BECAUSE (1) HIS ARGUMENT DEPENDS ON THE CORRECTNESS OF HIS INTERPRETATION OF THE TAX LAW, MISINTERPRETATIONS OF WHICH BY THE CITY ARE IMMUNE (GOV CODE 860.2(B)), AND (2) PLAINTIFF COULD HAVE MITIGATED HIS LOST 1031 EXCHANGE BENEFIT BY PAYING THE DISPUTED TAX AND THEN FILING A TAX REFUND CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
(SC-105) ANSWER TO REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRUCE KRELL, TRUSTEE, KRELL TRUST
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BRUCE KRELL, TRUSTEE, KRELL TRUST ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS, WITH LETTER OF PERMISSION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,100.00 FILED BY BRUCE KRELL, TRUSTEE, KRELL TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO CHRIS MATTHEWS, OLD REPUBLIC TITLE 4045 - 24TH STE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94114 415-2820830
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRUCE KRELL, TRUSTEE, KRELL TRUST
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED SEP-27-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF KRELL TRUST IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRUCE KRELL, TRUSTEE. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2018 - JUDGMENT.
